title: scorzonera hispanica var. genuina
intro: Scorzonera hispanica var. genuina, also known as Spanish scorzonera or black salsify, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is used for its edible roots, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant. Consuming scorzonera has been linked to various health benefits, including reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Scorzonera can be prepared in various ways, including being boiled, roasted, or made into a tea, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbal supplements.
